result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= timestamp without time zone
LINE 22:   WHERE c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 mo...
                               ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH ch AS (
  SELECT
    caseid__c AS case_id,
    createddate,
    oldvalue__c,
    newvalue__c,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY caseid__c ORDER BY createddate) AS rn,
    COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY caseid__c) AS assignment_cnt
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c ILIKE '%%owner%%'
), first_owner AS (
  SELECT case_id, newvalue__c AS first_owner_id, assignment_cnt
  FROM ch
  WHERE rn = 1
), eligible_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.createddate,
         c.closeddate,
         fo.first_owner_id
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN first_owner fo ON fo.case_id = c.id
  WHERE c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
    AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND fo.assignment_cnt = 1
), agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS cases_cnt
  FROM (
    SELECT first_owner_id AS agent_id, case_id FROM eligible_cases
    UNION ALL
    SELECT oldvalue__c AS agent_id, caseid__c AS case_id FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c ILIKE '%%owner%%'
    UNION ALL
    SELECT newvalue__c AS agent_id, caseid__c AS case_id FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c ILIKE '%%owner%%'
  ) x
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY agent_id
), avg_handle AS (
  SELECT ec.first_owner_id AS agent_id,
         AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (ec.closeddate - ec.createddate))) AS avg_handle_seconds,
         COUNT(*) AS closed_cases
  FROM eligible_cases ec
  GROUP BY ec.first_owner_id
)
SELECT ah.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM avg_handle ah
JOIN agent_case_counts acc ON acc.agent_id = ah.agent_id
WHERE acc.cases_cnt > 1
ORDER BY ah.avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH ch AS (
  SELECT
    caseid__c AS case_id,
    createddate,
    oldvalue__c,
    newvalue__c,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY caseid__c ORDER BY createddate) AS rn,
    COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY caseid__c) AS assignment_cnt
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c ILIKE '%owner%'
), first_owner AS (
  SELECT case_id, newvalue__c AS first_owner_id, assignment_cnt
  FROM ch
  WHERE rn = 1
), eligible_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.createddate,
         c.closeddate,
         fo.first_owner_id
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN first_owner fo ON fo.case_id = c.id
  WHERE c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
    AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND fo.assignment_cnt = 1
), agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS cases_cnt
  FROM (
    SELECT first_owner_id AS agent_id, case_id FROM eligible_cases
    UNION ALL
    SELECT oldvalue__c AS agent_id, caseid__c AS case_id FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c ILIKE '%owner%'
    UNION ALL
    SELECT newvalue__c AS agent_id, caseid__c AS case_id FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c ILIKE '%owner%'
  ) x
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY agent_id
), avg_handle AS (
  SELECT ec.first_owner_id AS agent_id,
         AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (ec.closeddate - ec.createddate))) AS avg_handle_seconds,
         COUNT(*) AS closed_cases
  FROM eligible_cases ec
  GROUP BY ec.first_owner_id
)
SELECT ah.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM avg_handle ah
JOIN agent_case_counts acc ON acc.agent_id = ah.agent_id
WHERE acc.cases_cnt > 1
ORDER BY ah.avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH ch AS (
  SELECT
    caseid__c AS case_id,
    createddate,
    oldvalue__c,
    newvalue__c,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY caseid__c ORDER BY createddate) AS rn,
    COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY caseid__c) AS assignment_cnt
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c ILIKE '%owner%'
), first_owner AS (
  SELECT case_id, newvalue__c AS first_owner_id, assignment_cnt
  FROM ch
  WHERE rn = 1
), eligible_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.createddate,
         c.closeddate,
         fo.first_owner_id
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN first_owner fo ON fo.case_id = c.id
  WHERE c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
    AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND fo.assignment_cnt = 1
), agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS cases_cnt
  FROM (
    SELECT first_owner_id AS agent_id, case_id FROM eligible_cases
    UNION ALL
    SELECT oldvalue__c AS agent_id, caseid__c AS case_id FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c ILIKE '%owner%'
    UNION ALL
    SELECT newvalue__c AS agent_id, caseid__c AS case_id FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c ILIKE '%owner%'
  ) x
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY agent_id
), avg_handle AS (
  SELECT ec.first_owner_id AS agent_id,
         AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (ec.closeddate - ec.createddate))) AS avg_handle_seconds,
         COUNT(*) AS closed_cases
  FROM eligible_cases ec
  GROUP BY ec.first_owner_id
)
SELECT ah.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM avg_handle ah
JOIN agent_case_counts acc ON acc.agent_id = ah.agent_id
WHERE acc.cases_cnt > 1
ORDER BY ah.avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH ch AS (
  SELECT
    caseid__c AS case_id,
    createddate,
    oldvalue__c,
    newvalue__c,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY caseid__c ORDER BY createddate) AS rn,
    COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY caseid__c) AS assignment_cnt
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c ILIKE '%owner%'
), first_owner AS (
  SELECT case_id, newvalue__c AS first_owner_id, assignment_cnt
  FROM ch
  WHERE rn = 1
), eligible_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.createddate,
         c.closeddate,
         fo.first_owner_id
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN first_owner fo ON fo.case_id = c.id
  WHERE c.createddate::timestamp >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
    AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND fo.assignment_cnt = 1
), agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS cases_cnt
  FROM (
    SELECT first_owner_id AS agent_id, case_id FROM eligible_cases
    UNION ALL
    SELECT oldvalue__c AS agent_id, caseid__c AS case_id FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c ILIKE '%owner%'
    UNION ALL
    SELECT newvalue__c AS agent_id, caseid__c AS case_id FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c ILIKE '%owner%'
  ) x
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY agent_id
), avg_handle AS (
  SELECT ec.first_owner_id AS agent_id,
         AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (ec.closeddate::timestamp - ec.createddate::timestamp))) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM eligible_cases ec
  GROUP BY ec.first_owner_id
)
SELECT ah.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM avg_handle ah
JOIN agent_case_counts acc ON acc.agent_id = ah.agent_id
WHERE acc.cases_cnt > 1
ORDER BY ah.avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;
